summary: Tested Film Tier & Like System features: Tier popup at creation, End-run popup, Self-like blocking, Likers modal, CineBoard like button, and tier-expectations API. All core features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Self-like blocking correctly implemented at server.py line 4967-4968
Tier-expectations API returns 404 for non-owners as expected
Likers modal shows nickname, production_house, and liked_at timestamp

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 passed, 2 skipped due to test user having no films)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing films from Hall of Fame
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tier and like system features are working. CineBoard has like buttons visible and functional. Likers modal shows 'WHO LIKED (count)' with user list. Self-like is blocked with error 'Non puoi mettere like ai tuoi film'. Tier-expectations API correctly restricts access to film owners only.

features_tested.tier_popup_at_creation: Code verified - triggered when film_tier != normal (line 1979 in App.js)
features_tested.end_run_popup: Code verified - triggered for owner when visiting film with film_tier set (line 2965-2976 in App.js)
features_tested.self_like_blocking: PASSED - Returns 400 with message 'Non puoi mettere like ai tuoi film'
features_tested.likers_modal: PASSED - Shows list of users who liked with nickname, production house, and timestamp
features_tested.cineboard_like_button: PASSED - 19 like buttons found, toggle works correctly
features_tested.tier_expectations_api: PASSED - Returns correct structure with expected/actual revenue, ratio, met_expectations, message
